name: Truffle Garlic Parmesan Fries
description: Crispy house-cut fries tossed in white truffle oil, grated parmesan, fresh parsley, and garlic aioli.

name: Crispy Calamari Bites
description: Lightly seasoned tender calamari served with charred lemon and house zesty remoulade.

name: Classic Resto Smash Burger
description: Double dry-aged smash patties, melty cheddar, house burger sauce, and caramelized onions on toasted brioche.

name: Neapolitan Pepperoni Pizza
description: San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, spicy pepperoni slices, fresh basil, and a hot honey drizzle.

name: Wild Mushroom Tagliatelle
description: Handmade tagliatelle, sautéed wild porcini mushrooms, and creamy white wine sauce, finished with shaved black truffle.

name: Iced Vanilla Cold Brew
description: Our signature 18-hour cold brew, organic Madagascar vanilla, and cold foaming oat milk.

name: Fresh Watermelon Mint Cooler
description: Cold-pressed fresh watermelon juice, key lime juice, muddled wild mint, and organic blue agave.

name: Belgian Chocolate Fudge Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten premium dark chocolate center, served with a scoop of house vanilla bean ice cream.

name: Classic Italian Tiramisu
description: Espresso-soaked coffee ladyfingers, velvety whipped layers of mascarpone cream, dusted with premium dark cocoa powder.
